channel.title: GitHub Shell Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Shell in GitHub

item.title: base-org/node
item.description: Everything required to run your own Base node

item.title: youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
item.description: 《代码随想录》LeetCode 刷题攻略：200道经典题目刷题顺序，共60w字的详细图解，视频难点剖析，50余张思维导图，支持C++，Java，Python，Go，JavaScript等多语言版本，从此算法学习不再迷茫！🔥🔥 来看看，你会发现相见恨晚！🚀

item.title: asdf-vm/asdf
item.description: Extendable version manager with support for Ruby, Node.js, Elixir, Erlang & more

item.title: Elegycloud/clash-for-linux-backup
item.description: 基于Clash Core 制作的Clash For Linux备份仓库 A Clash For Linux Backup Warehouse Based on Clash Core

item.title: edoardottt/awesome-hacker-search-engines
item.description: A curated list of awesome search engines useful during Penetration testing, Vulnerability assessments, Red/Blue Team operations, Bug Bounty and more

item.title: ai-dock/comfyui
item.description: ComfyUI docker images for use in GPU cloud and local environments. Includes AI-Dock base for authentication and improved user experience.

item.title: SeleniumHQ/docker-selenium
item.description: Provides a simple way to run Selenium Grid with Chrome, Firefox, and Edge using Docker, making it easier to perform browser automation

item.title: ohmybash/oh-my-bash
item.description: A delightful community-driven framework for managing your bash configuration, and an auto-update tool so that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
